# Chapter 22 Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion (NCEP) Audit

The Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion (NCEP) audit reviews the NCEP credits transferred
to/from the player-tracking system versus the actual meter movement.


## To audit non-cashable electronic promotions:

Click Non-Cashable Elec Promotion in the Period Timeline or User Tasks list. The NCEP
tasks appear.




![Figure 22-1 User Tasks List-NCEP Tasks](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/261.2.png)




Access the following tasks as part of the NCEP portion of the audit:

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="261" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 22 Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion (NCEP) Audit" -->

<tr>
<th>Task</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Import NCEP Information</td>
<td>Import system NCEP-in and system NCEP-out revenue summaries by machine.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Audit NCEP Meters</td>
<td>Audit and correct NCEP-in and NCEP-out variances between actual and meters.</td>
</tr>
</table>

### 22.1 Importing NCEP Information

To import the NCEP drop data:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Elec Promotion in the Period Timeline or User Tasks list. A list
of options appears.

2\. Click Import NCEP Information. The Retrieving Drop progress window appears.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="262" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 22 Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion (NCEP) Audit" -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/263.1.png)




3\. Click Done after the NCEP Drop is complete. The Retrieving Drop window closes.


### 22.2 Adjusting NCEP Variances

Manage NCEP variances by accepting them, or by adjusting a drop or meter.


#### 22.2.1 Accepting NCEP Variances

To accept NCEP variances:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks
list. A list of options appears.

2\. Click Audit NCEP Meters. The NCEP Audit window opens.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/263.2.png)




3\. Select a machine.

4\. Click Accept in the NCEP Audit window if the variance is within established guidelines. A
confirmation prompt appears.

5\. Click Yes. The variance is accepted, and the updated NCEP Audit window appears without
the machine voucher variance.


#### 22.2.2 Adjusting NCEP Drops

To adjust an NCEP drop:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks
list. A list of options appears.

2\. Click Audit NCEP Meters. The NCEP Audit window opens.

3\. Select All Machines or Exceptions. The NCEP meters filter accordingly.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="263" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 22 Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion (NCEP) Audit" -->

4\. Select a machine.

5\. Click Actual. The System NCEP Adjust for Machine window appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/264.1.png)




6\. Enter the adjusted amounts in the Actual Xtra Credit, Actual Point Play, and Actual
Bonus To Credit Meter fields.

7\. Click OK. The adjustments save.


#### 22.3 NCEP-In Variances

NCEP-in information is obtained from player tracking data gathered during the NCEP Import
task done at end of day.


#### 22.3.1 Viewing Audit NCEP-In Meters

To view audit NCEP-in meters:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks
list. A list of tasks appears.

2\. Click Audit NCEP Meters. The NCEP Audit window opens. (NCEP In is the default
view.)

3\. Select All Machines or Exceptions to filter the NCEP data.


#### 22.3.2 Adjusting NCEP-In Meter Variances

To adjust NCEP-in meter variances:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks
list. A list of tasks appears.

2\. Click Audit NCEP Meters. The NCEP Audit window opens.

3\. Select a machine.

4\. Click Meters. The NCEP In Meter Adjustment for Machine window appears.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="264" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 22 Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion (NCEP) Audit" -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/265.1.png)




5\. Enter the adjusted meter value in the Adjustment field.

6\. Click OK. The adjustment saves.


#### 22.3.3 Accepting NCEP-In Variances


##### To accept NCEP-in variances:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks
list. A list of tasks appears.

2\. Click Audit NCEP Meters. The NCEP Audit window opens.

3\. Select a machine.
OR
Press CTRL + click to select multiple machines.

4\. Click Accept if the variances are within established guidelines. A confirmation message
appears.

5\. Click Yes. The variances are accepted.


#### 22.3.4 Unaccepting NCEP-In Variances

To unaccept a NCEP In variance:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks
list. A list of tasks appears.

2\. Click Audit NCEP Meters. The NCEP Audit window opens.

3\. Select a machine.

4\. Click Unaccept if the variance is not within established guidelines. A confirmation
message appears.

5\. Click Yes. The variance is no longer accepted.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="265" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 22 Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion (NCEP) Audit" -->


#### 22.4 NCEP-Out Variances

Conduct the NCEP Import task at end of day to obtain NCEP-out drops from player tracking
data.

To display NCEP-out variances:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks
list. A list of tasks appears.

2\. Click Audit NCEP Meters. The NCEP Audit window opens.

3\. Select NCEP Out. The NCEP Audit window displays NCEP-out variances.

4\. Select All Machines or Exceptions to filter the displayed vouchers.


##### 22.4.1 Adjusting NCEP-Out Meter Variances

To adjust NCEP-out variances:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks
list. A list of tasks appears.

2\. Click Audit NCEP Meters. The NCEP Audit window opens.

3\. Select NCEP Out. The NCEP Audit window displays NCEP-out variances.

4\. Select a machine.

5\. Click Meters. The NCEP Out Meter Adjustment for Machine window appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/266.2.png)




6\. Enter the adjusted meter value in the Adjustment field.

7\. Click OK. The adjustment is saved.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="266" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 22 Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion (NCEP) Audit" -->


##### 22.4.2 Accepting NCEP-Out Variances

To accept NCEP-out variances:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks
list. A list of tasks appears.

2\. Click Audit NCEP Meters. The NCEP Audit window opens.

3\. Select NCEP Out. The NCEP Audit window displays NCEP-out variances.

4\. Select a machine.
OR
Press Ctrl + click to select multiple machines.

5\. Click Accept if the variances are within established guidelines. A confirmation prompt
appears.

6\. Click Yes. The variances are accepted.


##### 22.4.3 Unaccepting NCEP-Out Variances

To unaccept an NCEP-out variance:

1\. Click Non-Cashable Electronic Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks
list. A list of tasks appears.

2\. Click Audit NCEP Meters. The NCEP Audit window opens.

3\. Select NCEP Out. The NCEP Audit window displays NCEP-out variances.

4\. Select a machine.

5\. Click Unaccept if the variance is not within established guidelines. A confirmation
prompt appears.

6\. Click Yes. The variance is no longer accepted.
